get.summary: Issues a CSRF token cookie for anonymous visitors (double-submit cookie pattern).

200.description: 200 OK and sets the bc_csrf cookie.

get.summary: Get current authenticated user.

200.description: The current user if authenticated; otherwise unauthorized.

post.summary: Forwards a request to propose a new commons to the commons API.

requestBody.description: The request containing the name and description of the commons to propose.

201.description: The ID of the proposed commons as a string.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of commons by forwarding the request to the commons API client.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: A paginated response containing the list of commons.

post.summary: Links a concern to the specified commons.

parameters.name: commonsId
parameters.description: The ID of the commons.

parameters.name: concernId
parameters.description: The ID of the concern to link.

get.summary: Retrieves all concerns linked to the specified commons.

parameters.name: commonsId
parameters.description: The ID of the commons.

200.description: A list of concerns linked to the commons.

post.summary: Forwards a request to raise a new concern to the concerns API.

requestBody.description: The request containing the details of the concern to raise.

201.description: The ID of the raised concern as a string.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of concerns by forwarding the request to the concerns API client.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: A paginated response containing the list of concerns.

post.summary: Declares that the current participant is affected by the specified concern.

parameters.name: concernId
parameters.description: The ID of the concern.

delete.summary: Withdraws the current participant's affectedness declaration for the specified concern.

parameters.name: concernId
parameters.description: The ID of the concern.

get.summary: Gets root posts for a specific thread with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (null for first page).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default: 5).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of pagination (default: forward).

200.description: The root posts for the thread with cursor pagination.

post.summary: Creates a new root post in a specific thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread to post to.

201.description: The ID of the created post.

get.summary: Gets root posts for a thread identified by entity with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: The type of entity (e.g., "idea", "signal", "action").

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The ID of the entity.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (null for first page).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default: 5).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of pagination (default: forward).

200.description: The root posts for the thread with cursor pagination.

get.summary: Gets replies to a specific post with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: The ID of the post to get replies for.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (null for first page).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of replies to return (default: 5).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of pagination (default: forward).

200.description: The replies for the post with cursor pagination.

post.summary: Creates a new reply to a specific post.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: The ID of the post to reply to.

201.description: The ID of the created reply.

post.summary: Uploads a document file and stores it in the system.

201.description: The unique identifier of the stored document.

get.summary: Gets a document in the specified size (thumbnail, display, or original).

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The document identifier.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The requested image size (thumbnail, display, original).

200.description: The document content with appropriate headers.

get.summary:
Gets document thumbnail specifically.
Convenience endpoint for easier frontend URL construction.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The document identifier.

200.description: The document thumbnail.

get.summary:
Gets document in display size specifically.
Convenience endpoint for easier frontend URL construction.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The document identifier.

200.description: The document in display size.

get.summary: Returns all currently identified emerging signal patterns.

200.description: A feed of emerging patterns ordered by cluster label.

get.summary: Gets all ideas with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: Filter.SearchTerm
parameters.description: Optional free-text search term to match against idea title or description.

parameters.name: Filter.Status
parameters.description: Optional status filter (e.g., "Draft", "Published").

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: Paginated list of ideas with metadata.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific idea.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea.

200.description: Detailed idea information.

get.summary: Initiates the OIDC authorization request with PKCE and state.

200.description: Redirect to the identity provider's authorize endpoint.

get.summary: Initiates the OIDC authorization request with prompt=create to open the registration UI directly.

200.description: Redirect to the identity provider's registration screen.

get.summary: Signs the user out of both cookie and OIDC schemes, clears server-side tokens, and redirects to the app.

200.description: Redirect to post-logout location.

post.summary: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token using the server-side token store.

200.description: 200 on success; 401 if session/refresh token missing; 502 on IdP error.

get.summary: Gets all signals with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: Filter.TimeRange
parameters.description: Optional time window to filter signals, for example "24h" or "7d".

parameters.name: Filter.AmplificationLevel
parameters.description: Optional amplification level filter (e.g., "low", "medium", "high").

parameters.name: Filter.SearchTerm
parameters.description: Optional free-text search term to match against signal content.

parameters.name: Filter.Tags
parameters.description: Optional collection of tags to filter results by.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: A paginated list of filtered signals with metadata.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific signal including amplification history.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the signal.

200.description: Detailed signal information with amplification history.

post.summary: Amplifies a signal by the current participant.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The ID of the signal to amplify.

200.description: The amplification response with updated count.

delete.summary: Removes a user's amplification from a signal.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The ID of the signal to deamplify.

200.description: The deamplification response with updated count.

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of societies with optional filtering.

parameters.name: Filter.Tag
parameters.description: Gets or sets a tag to filter societies by; only societies with this tag are returned.

parameters.name: Filter.HasGeographicBounds
parameters.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether to filter to only societies that have geographic bounds.
When null, no geographic filtering is applied.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: Paginated list of societies.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific society.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society.

200.description: Detailed society information.

get.summary: Gets the active members of a specific society.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society.

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.description: Typed filter payload bound from the filter.* prefix (e.g., filter.status).

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: Paginated list of society members.

post.summary: Joins a society on behalf of the authenticated participant.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society to join.

requestBody.description: The join request containing the social contract ID.

get.summary:
Gets the IDs of all societies the authenticated participant is an active member of.
Returns an empty array for unauthenticated requests.

200.description: An array of society ID strings.

delete.summary: Removes the authenticated participant's membership from a society.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society to leave.

get.summary: Gets all invite links created by the authenticated participant for the specified society.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society.

200.description: The participant's invite links for the society.

post.summary:
Creates an invite link for the specified society. The caller must be an active member.
Membership is verified downstream in CorePlatform.API.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society.

requestBody.description: The invite link creation request containing an optional note.

201.description: The ID of the created invite link.

get.summary: Gets popular tags based on usage frequency.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default: 50, max: 100).

200.description: List of popular tags with usage counts.

get.summary: Searches for tags by query string.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default: 20, max: 50).

200.description: List of matching tags.

get.summary: Gets recently used tags by the current user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default: 30, max: 100).

200.description: List of recently used tags.

get.summary: Gets all invite links for the authenticated participant, sorted by creation date descending.

200.description: All invite links (active and revoked) for the participant.

post.summary: Creates an invite link for the authenticated participant.

get.summary: Resolves an invite link token to the inviter's user ID. Accessible without authentication.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The URL-safe base64url token from the invite link.

200.description: The inviter's user ID if the token is valid; 404 if not found or revoked.

delete.summary: Revokes an invite link owned by the authenticated participant.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the invite link to revoke.

204.description: 204 No Content on success; 403 if the caller does not own the link; 404 if not found.

post.summary: Forwards a request to form a new user group to the user groups API.

requestBody.description: The request containing the details of the user group to form.

201.description: The ID of the formed user group.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of user groups governing the specified commons.

parameters.name: commonsId
parameters.description: The ID of the commons to filter by.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: A paginated response containing the list of user groups.

get.summary: Retrieves all user groups that the authenticated participant is a member of.

200.description: A list of user groups the current participant belongs to.

GetCurrentUserResponse.description: Response returned when querying the current authenticated user.

success.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

error.description: Gets or sets an error message when Success is false; otherwise null.

user.description: Gets or sets the currently authenticated user information when available.

UserInfo.description: Basic user profile information used by the gateway.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the user.

username.description: Gets or sets the user's canonical username.

pseudonym.description: Gets or sets the user's pseudonym as displayed in context.

email.description: Gets or sets the user's email address.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

ApiResponse.description: Static factory methods for creating API responses.

ProposeCommonsRequest.description: Request to propose a new commons.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

PaginatedResponseOfCommonsListItemRespon.description: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

CommonsListItemResponse.description: Represents a commons item in a list response.

id.description: The unique identifier of the commons.

status.description: The lifecycle status of the commons.

proposedByPseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the participant who proposed the commons.

proposedAt.description: The timestamp when the commons was proposed.

SortDescriptor.description: Describes a single sort operation against a logical field.

field.description: Logical field name to sort by. Mapping to actual data model is responsibility of the consumer.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

ConcernListItemResponse.description: Represents a concern item in a list response.

id.description: The unique identifier of the concern.

raisedByPseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the user who raised the concern.

tags.description: The tags associated with the concern.

signals.description: The signals related to the concern.

affectedCount.description: The number of participants who have declared this concern affects them.

isAffectedByCurrentUser.description: Whether the current user has declared this concern affects them.

ReferenceSignal.description: Represents a signal referenced by a concern, including its unique identifier and title.

id.description: The unique identifier of the signal.

RaiseConcernRequest.description: Request used to raise a new concern in the system.

name.description: Name of the concern being raised.

tags.description: Tags associated with the raised concern.

signalIds.description: Ids of signals associated with the concern.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

ApiEnvelopeOfPostsViewModel.description: Generic API response envelope that wraps data with metadata.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the response was generated.

data.description: The actual data payload.

PostsViewModel.description: Represents posts for a specific thread in the gateway with cursor-based pagination.

entityType.description: Gets or sets the type of entity this thread is about.

entityId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the entity this thread is about.

threadId.description: Gets or sets the thread ID for this discourse.

totalPostCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of all posts in this thread (includes replies).

totalRootPostCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of root posts in this thread.

totalParticipants.description: Gets or sets the total number of unique participants.

lastActivityAt.description: Gets or sets when the last post was created.

posts.description: Gets or sets the cursor-paginated root posts for this thread.

CursorPaginatedResponseOfPostViewModel.description:
Cursor-based paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.
Provides stable pagination using opaque cursors instead of offset-based pagination.

items.description: The items for the current page.

nextCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the next page of results.
Null if no more pages are available.

previousCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the previous page of results.
Null if this is the first page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

hasPreviousPage.description: Indicates whether there is a previous page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items requested for this page.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the response was generated.

PostViewModel.description: Represents an individual post in the gateway.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this post.

authorId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the participant who authored this post.

authorPseudonym.description: Gets or sets the pseudonym of the author.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the post.

createdAt.description: Gets or sets when the post was created.

replyCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of direct replies.

lastReplyAt.description: Gets or sets when the last reply was posted.

hasReplies.description: Gets whether this post has replies.

ApiEnvelopeOfPostRepliesViewModel.description: Generic API response envelope that wraps data with metadata.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the response was generated.

data.description: The actual data payload.

PostRepliesViewModel.description: Represents replies to a post with cursor-based pagination.

postId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the parent post these replies belong to.

replies.description: Gets or sets the cursor-paginated replies to this post.

CursorPaginatedResponseOfReplyViewModel.description:
Cursor-based paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.
Provides stable pagination using opaque cursors instead of offset-based pagination.

items.description: The items for the current page.

nextCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the next page of results.
Null if no more pages are available.

previousCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the previous page of results.
Null if this is the first page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

hasPreviousPage.description: Indicates whether there is a previous page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items requested for this page.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the response was generated.

ReplyViewModel.description: Represents an individual reply in the gateway.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this reply.

authorId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the participant who authored this reply.

authorPseudonym.description: Gets or sets the pseudonym of the author.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the reply.

createdAt.description: Gets or sets when the reply was created.

parentPostId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the post this reply responds to.

replyCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of nested replies.

hasMoreReplies.description: Gets or sets whether there are nested replies.

ApiEnvelopeOfString.description: Generic API response envelope that wraps data with metadata.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the response was generated.

data.description: The actual data payload.

CreatePostRequest.description: Request payload to create a new post.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the post.

CreateReplyRequest.description: Request payload to create a new reply.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the reply.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

keywords.description: Top TF-IDF keywords for this cluster.

SignalViewModel.description: View model for signals tailored to the web frontend.

id.description: The unique identifier of the signal.

tags.description: The tags associated with the signal.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

amplificationCount.description: The number of amplifications for this signal.

commentCount.description: The number of comments for this signal.

isAmplifiedByCurrentUser.description: Indicates whether the current user has amplified this signal.

isOriginator.description: Indicates whether the current user is the originator of this signal.

firstAttachmentThumbnail.description:
URL to the first attachment thumbnail (if any images exist).
This provides a visual preview for the signal in the list view.

attachmentCount.description: Total number of attachments associated with this signal.

FilterStateViewModel.description: Represents the filter state that was applied to generate this response.

timeRange.description: The time range filter that was applied.

amplificationLevel.description: The amplification level filter that was applied.

searchTerm.description: The search term that was applied.

tags.description: The tags that were filtered by.

sortBy.description: The sort option that was applied.

attachmentIds.description: The document IDs of attachments to associate with the signal.

latitude.description: Optional latitude coordinate of the signal's location.

longitude.description: Optional longitude coordinate of the signal's location.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

SignalDetailViewModel.description: Detailed view model for a signal including amplification history and metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier of the signal.

tags.description: The tags associated with the signal.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

lastAmplifiedAt.description: The last amplification timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

amplifyCount.description: The total number of amplifications for this signal.

amplifications.description: The list of amplifications for this signal.

isAmplifiedByCurrentUser.description: Indicates whether the current user has amplified this signal.

isOriginator.description: Indicates whether the current user is the originator of this signal.

attachments.description: The attachments associated with this signal.

suggestedActions.description: The suggested actions for this signal.

id.description: The unique identifier of the amplification.

amplifierPseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the person who amplified the signal.

amplifiedAt.description: The amplification timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

comment.description: Optional comment provided with the amplification.

displayUrl.description: The URL to the display-sized version of the attachment.

SuggestedActionViewModel.description: View model for a suggested action on a signal.

id.description: The unique identifier of the suggested action.

actionType.description: The action type code name (e.g. MakeACall, VisitAWebpage).

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to call. Present for MakeACall actions.

url.description: The URL to visit. Present for VisitAWebpage actions.

details.description: Optional free-text context provided by the suggester.

suggestedByPseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the participant who suggested the action.

suggestedAt.description: When the action was suggested, in ISO 8601 format.

commonsId.description: The ID of the commons this user group will govern.

name.description: The name of the user group.

philosophy.description: The philosophy of the user group.

charter.description: The charter defining the rules and policies of the group.

rejectionThreshold.description: The rejection threshold, represented as a decimal between 0 and 1.

approvalSettings.description: The approval settings, if applicable based on the join policy.

entryRequirements.description: A description of any specific requirements for joining the group.

memberListPublic.description: Indicates whether the member list is public or private.

UserGroupJoinPolicyDto.description: Specifies the policies that determine how users can join a group.

approvalThreshold.description: The threshold for approval decisions, represented as a decimal between 0 and 1.

vetoEnabled.description: Indicates whether veto power is enabled.

approvalThreshold.description: The threshold for shunning decisions, represented as a decimal between 0 and 1.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

joinPolicy.description: The join policy of the group.
